title: RED THREAD: How China plays hardball
summary_full: Welcome to Red Thread, Euractiv’s weekly newsletter on the EU’s relationship with China and the wider Asia-Pacific. I’m Christina Zhao in Oceania, joined by Anupriya Datta in Europe. This week, we explore Beijing’s economic coercion playbook… Over the past two decades, Europe watched China test its economic leverage on other countries. Australia lost access to its biggest export market for wine. […]
